careers.title: Shaqooyinka DeHub
careers.subtitle: Ku biir kooxda dhisaysa mustaqbalka baraha bulshada ee aan lahayn xarun
careers.intro: Waxaan raadinayaa shakhsiyaad xamaasad leh oo raba inay ka qayb qaataan mowjadda xigta ee baraha bulshada — ta abuurayaasha iyo bulshada meesha koowaad ka siiyo. Dhammaan doorashooyinku waa meel fog oo buuxda leh saacado dabacsan.
careers.bdmAbout: Mid ka mid ah Maamulayaasha Horumarka Ganacsiga ee DeHub, waxaad noqon doontaa qayb ka mid ah xoogga wadajiridda ee ka dambeeya istiraatiijiyaddayada iskaashiga. Hawshaadu waa inaad aqoonsato, ku hawlgeliso, oo heshiisyo la gasho shirkadaha Web2 iyo Web3 labadaba.
careers.bdmResp1: Aqoonso oo xaqiiji iskaashiyo istiraatiiji ah oo ay la yihiin shirkadaha Web2 iyo Web3 ee ku habboon howsha DeHub
careers.bdmResp2: Dhis oo maaree tuubada iskaashi suurtagal ah, maalgelin, iyo fursadaha isku-duwidda
careers.bdmResp3: Ka matalid DeHub dhacdooyinka warshadaha, shirarka, iyo kulamada farsamada
careers.bdmResp4: Wada-hadal shuruudaha iskaashiga, noocyada wadaagga dakhliga, iyo heshiisyada suuq-geynta wadajirka ah
careers.bdmResp5: La shaqee kooxaha badeecada iyo suuq-geynta si loo horumariiyo olole iyo isku-duwiyo wadajir ah
careers.bdmReq1: Khibrad la xaqiijiyay oo ku saabsan horumarka ganacsiga, iskaashiyada, ama iibinta dhexdeeda tignoolajiga, cayaaraha, ama Web3
careers.bdmReq2: Shabakad xooggan oo hadda jirta oo ku saabsan meel kriibto/Web3 ah ama dhaqaalaha abuuraha waa faa'iido weyn
careers.bdmReq3: Xirfado xiiso leh oo xiriir iyo wadahadal ah — waxaad xiri kartaa heshiisyada oo dhisi kartaa xiriirro waaxa
careers.bdmReq4: Naftii u dhaqdhaqaaqa oo ku raaxaysan shaqada iskeed ah ee deegaan meel-fog-horreeya ah
careers.bdmReq5: Xiiso dhab ah oo ku saabsan baraha bulshada ee aan lahayn xarun, NFT, ama tignoolajiga blockchain
careers.bdmComp: Doorkani wuxuu bixiyaa mushaar aasaasi ah oo wada-hadal ah iyo qaab-dhismeedka komishanka OTE ee aan lahayn xad oo si toos ah ugu xiran iskaashiyada aad keento.
careers.negotiableBase: mushaar aasaasi ah oo wada-hadal ah
careers.uncappedOTE: qaab-dhismeedka komishanka OTE ee aan lahayn xad
careers.ambassadorAbout: Safiir Sumadda DeHub ahaan waxaad tahay wejiga iyo codka balaatifoormka bulshaddaada. Shaqadaadu waa inaad faafiso ereyga ku saabsan DeHub kanalal kasta oo aad taabato.
careers.ambassadorResp1: Ku samee oo ku wadaag nuxur dhab ah oo ku saabsan DeHub kanaalladaada shakhsiga ee bulshada
careers.ambassadorResp2: Si firfircoon ula falgal bulshada DeHub ee app-ka — qor, faallo dhig, oo la macaamil isticmaalayaasha kale
careers.ambassadorResp3: Ka qayb qaado oo ka matalid DeHub dhacdooyinka nolosha dhabta ah, kulamada, iyo shirarka aagaaga
careers.ambassadorResp4: Shabakaddaada shakhsiga ku soo jiido isticmaalayaal cusub iyo abuurayaal balaatifoormka
careers.ambassadorResp5: Bixi jawaab-celin iyo fikrado bulshada ka yimid si ay u caawiso qaab-dhismeedka khariidada badeecada
careers.ambassadorReq1: Joogitaan baro bulshada firfircoon ah oo leh ka-qaybgal dhab ah (tirada raaciyeyaasha ka yar ayay tahay dhab-ahaanshaha)
careers.ambassadorReq2: Xamaasad Web3, kriibto, cayaaraha, ama dhaqanka abuuraha
careers.ambassadorReq3: Xirfado xiriir oo xooggan iyo awood loo sharaxo fikradaha adag si fudud
careers.ambassadorReq4: Is-bilaabiye kaas oo si iskeed ah u qorshayn kara oo u fulin kara ololooyinka
careers.ambassadorReq5: Khibrad safiir, saameyn, ama maamulka bulshada oo hore waa boono
careers.ambassadorComp: Safiirrada Sumadda waxay helaan mushaar bishii oo wada-hadal ah oo si joogto ah loo bixiyo. Boono dheeraad ah ayaa laga yaabaa in la siiyo iyada oo ku saleysan waxqabadka ololaha, isdiiwaangelinta isticmaalayaasha, iyo heerarka korriinka bulshada.
careers.footerText: Ma aragto door kuu habboon? Nala soo xiriir
careers.pastExperiencePlaceholder: Noo sheeg khibraddaada la xiriirta ee BD, iskaashiyada, ama iibinta...
careers.whyHireYouPlaceholder: Maxaa kaa dhigaya qofka saxda ah ee doorkan?
careers.nameEmailRequired: Magaca iyo iimeylka waa loo baahan yahay
careers.applicationSuccess: Codsiga si guul leh ayaa loo diray! Waan kula soo xiriiri doonnaa.
careers.applicationFailed: Diriddu wuu fashilmay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
